creator: kseniia.journey-london-rexby
caption:
5 Gems you don’t want to miss Inside London’s British Library with @bloombergconnects📚

1. 🌍Planets in the Piazza, eight glacial stones with tiny human figures, created by artist Antony Gormley to celebrate our link to nature
2. 📖King’s Library, a glass tower containing over 65,000 books collected by King George III 
3. 🌟Treasures of the British Library Gallery, featuring Leonardo da Vinci’s notebooks and Shakespeare’s First Folio
4. 🎧The Listening Desk, letting you create your own soundscapes from rare UK recordings
5. 💡The 12-foot bronze Newton sculpture depicting the endless search for knowledge and creativity

Bloomberg Connects is a free app that gives digital insider access to over 1,000 cultural institutions🎨(including museums, parks, cultural spaces, and more). Explore exclusive content 🎥, such as interviews and behind-the-scenes clips curated by the institutions themselves to enhance your onsite experience. Each digital guide provides engaging audio, video, images, and descriptions in over 50 languages🌐

Download it now and become your own personal guide!
